verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
Pursuant to Section 6.7 of the Final Exclusive Negotiating Agreement, the City may, upon reasonable notice, request from Liverbird, progress reports about the project, but not more than once per month.

Notice is defined under Section 18 of the Final ENA, which states that notice must be in writing and either personally served or sent by certified mail specifically to Annalise Keating at the work address listed.

This request was personally served on Annalise for the first time that month. This is a valid request.

Pursuant to Section 6.7 of the Final Exclusive Negotiating Agreement, the City may, upon reasonable notice, request from Liverbird, progress reports about the project, but not more than once per month.

Notice is defined under Section 18 of the Final ENA, which states that notice must be in writing and either personally served or sent by certified mail specifically to Annalise Keating at the work address listed.

A valid request was already sent to Annalise in November. Under Section 6.7 only one request can be sent per month, so this request is not valid.

Pursuant to Section 6.7 of the Final Exclusive Negotiating Agreement, the City may, upon reasonable notice, request from Liverbird, progress reports about the project, but not more than once per month.

Notice is defined under Section 18 of the Final ENA, which states that notice must be in writing and either personally served or sent by certified mail specifically to Annalise Keating at the work address listed.

The request must be delivered to Annalise only pursuant to Section 18 of ENA. This request was delivered to Victoria Keating. Thus, this is not a valid request.
